_comment: Spark — Playful Pet Companion Theme for Clawd on Desk
name: Spark
author: Nikhil Hilster
description: A playful, mischievous pet companion that mirrors and amplifies the robot mascot's emotional state through expressive animations

viewBox._comment: Logical canvas in SVG units. Matches robot mascot's 45x45 unit viewBox for consistency.

layout._comment: Character's visible body area in viewBox units. Spark is compact and playful.

eyeTracking._comment: Spark's eyes follow cursor in idle states only. Multi-layer tracking with eyes and subtle body rotation.

states._comment: Each state maps to animation files. Only idle MUST be SVG for eye-tracking. Others can be APNG, GIF, WebP, PNG, JPG.

_comment_optional_states: Optional extras not in core 9 states. These use fallback behavior.

sleepSequence._comment: Full = play all 4 sleep animations. Spark yawns, dozes, collapses, then sleeps.

idleAnimations._comment: Random animations during idle to show personality. Spark gets bored and yawns.

timings._comment: All values in milliseconds. When mouse is idle, Spark starts getting tired; after 60s, falls asleep.

hitBoxes._comment: Clickable area in viewBox units. Default is required. Sleeping has smaller hitbox.

reactions._comment: Click/drag interactions. Spark has playful, cheeky reactions.

drag._comment: Spark enjoys being dragged and bounces along

clickLeft._comment: Double-click left: Spark grins and waves cheeky

clickRight._comment: Double-click right: Spark laughs and spins away

double._comment: 4 rapid clicks: Spark flails in dizzy panic

sounds._comment: Map logical sound names to audio files. Spark has playful completion sounds.

miniMode._comment: Spark supports mini mode — peeks at screen edge when minimized.

states._comment: 8 required states for mini mode. Spark peeks playfully from corners.

objectScale._comment: Fine-tune rendered size relative to viewBox. Spark is slightly larger than template default.
